mapper.select: select student_id "studentId", first_name "firstName", middle_name "middleName", last_name "lastName", standard, roll_no "rollNo", date_of_birth "dob", aadhar, bank_ifsc "bankIfsc", bank_account_number "accountNumber", bank_account_holder "accountHolder", household_id "householdId" from kusumika.student where student_id = #{id};

select student_id "studentId", first_name "firstName", middle_name "middleName", last_name "lastName", standard, roll_no "rollNo", date_of_birth "dob", aadhar, bank_ifsc "bankIfsc", bank_account_number "accountNumber", bank_account_holder "accountHolder", household_id "householdId" from kusumika.student where standard = #{standard}; and roll_no = #{rollNo};

select student_id "studentId", first_name "firstName", middle_name "middleName", last_name "lastName", standard, roll_no "rollNo", date_of_birth "dob", aadhar, bank_ifsc "bankIfsc", bank_account_number "accountNumber", bank_account_holder "accountHolder", household_id "householdId" from kusumika.student
